sections.paragraph: masc. a furnace; according to Kimchi a lime kiln, or a furnace for smelting metal, differing from תַּנּוּר an oven, Gen 19:28 Exo 9:8, 10 19:18 . So called apparently from its subduing metal; unless it be judged best to refer it to the Arab. قبس to kindle. [In Thes. the allusion to this Arabic verb is expressly renounced.]
